description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the fedora:latest Docker image and runs a global before_script to update the system, install glibc locale packages, generate the en_US.UTF-8 locale and set LC_ALL. Define a single stage called build_and_test and a job named build_script in that stage. The build_script job should execute the following commands in order: dnf -y install make gcc findutils texinfo automake, dnf -y install java-1.8.0-openjdk-devel, ./autogen.sh, ./configure, make, and make check. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
